value: Dialog opens with title/slug/type fields. Slug auto-generates from title. Cancel closes cleanly.
Meta+K opens palette. Search 'demo' returns 'Demo Travel' + 'Create new website'. Escape closes.

Dashboard auth requires: 1) Cookie sb-auth-token for middleware, 2) localStorage sb-{ref}-auth-token for Supabase client. Both must be set. Login page sets session but middleware redirects without cookie.

@supabase/ssr causes module resolution errors (dist/module/index.js missing in v2.100). Solution: use @supabase/supabase-js directly with createClient. Dashboard layout is client-side component, not server component.

findings: empty state renders correctly with icon+CTA
Add page dialog has proper form layout

value: Wizard 3-step flow works: 9 presets shown → click advances → name fills, subdomain auto-gens → availability check passes → review shows correct data. Not tested: actual creation (avoid test data).
Clicking preset changes color: Corporate #FCD116 → Tropical #00897B. ColorWell + textbox update. Live preview reflects change.
Theme/Brand Kit/Structure sub-tabs all switch correctly. Brand Kit shows logo+8 moods. Structure shows header(4)/footer(3)/mobile toggle.
Delete dialog: type-to-confirm 'demo-travel', Delete disabled until typed, Cancel closes cleanly.
Domain sub-tab shows CNAME wizard step 1: domain input + disabled Continue.

nextjs_title: Demo Travel | Tours y Viajes Personalizados

findings: delete confirmation with type-to-confirm is excellent UX

value: SEO & Scripts sub-tab loads with real data: meta title (43/70), meta description (112/160), keywords, Google Preview mockup with live text, head/body custom script textareas. All fields editable.
Blog status filter chips (All/Published/Draft/Scheduled) work. Clicking Draft hides empty state when 0 drafts exist (correct behavior).

Dashboard blog tab used 'blog_posts' table but correct table is 'website_blog_posts'. Also fixed join from 'blog_categories' to 'website_blog_categories'. Same fix applied to blog editor page and quotes page ('quote_requests' → 'website_quote_requests').

All website-related tables use 'website_' prefix: website_blog_posts, website_blog_categories, website_blog_tags, website_quote_requests, website_pages, website_versions. Dashboard code MUST use prefixed names. blog_posts (without prefix) is a separate table for the SEO pipeline.

findings: Google Preview mockup renders live with title+subdomain+description
custom scripts textareas with proper placeholders
CRITICAL: sidebar does not auto-collapse on mobile, leaves only ~150px for content, unusable layout
Need: sidebar auto-hide or drawer pattern below 768px breakpoint

value: VERIFIED: After hard reload, blog tab shows 5 published posts from website_blog_posts table. Fix from cycle 3 confirmed working. Posts: 'Los Mejores Destinos de Playa', '10 Destinos Imperdibles', 'Guia Completa', '5 Consejos para Viajar con Ninos', 'Turismo Sostenible'.
Blog tab shows 5 published posts with titles, excerpts, dates, checkboxes. Grid view with status badges. Table name fix (website_blog_posts) confirmed.
Analytics tab loads 3 tracker fields: GTM (GTM-XXXXXXX), GA4 (G-XXXXXXXXXX), Facebook Pixel (1234567890). 'Saved' indicator visible. Fields editable.
Products tab shows Hotels/Activities/Transfers type buttons + search. Type switching works via click. No products loaded for demo account (empty result, not error).
Auth cookie (sb-auth-token) expires after ~1 hour. Overnight runs need re-injection each cycle. Check hasCookie at start, re-inject if false. localStorage persists longer.
Next.js dev server caches compiled page code. After editing a dashboard page file, hard reload (ignoreCache=true) is needed for changes to take effect. Regular navigation keeps stale code.
Forgot password page renders: email input, 'Send reset link' button, 'Back to login' link. All elements present.

findings: 5 post cards with thumbnails, category badges, dates
proper typography hierarchy (h1 Blog > h3 post titles)

value: Version History sub-tab loads: 'No version history yet. Versions are created each time you publish.' Correct empty state.
Category pages (paquetes, destinos, hoteles, actividades) all return 200. These were 404 in earlier QA runs (March 2026). Sitemap now contains only valid URLs.

Score reached 95.0/100 on cycle 6. render_health improved from 0.625 to 0.75 thanks to category pages now resolving (paquetes/destinos/hoteles/actividades all 200). TARGET REACHED. Remaining gap: legal pages 307 (known issue #479, optional content).

VERIFIED: At 500px viewport, sidebar has -translate-x-full (hidden), hamburger button present, main content takes full 500px width. Before fix: sidebar 240px + main 260px = unusable. After fix: sidebar hidden, main 500px, hamburger toggle available.

findings: sidebar correctly hidden below md breakpoint
main content takes full viewport width

value: Dashboard sidebar uses fixed + transform for mobile drawer: -translate-x-full (hidden) / translate-x-0 (visible). md:relative md:translate-x-0 for desktop. Backdrop overlay on mobile when open. Auto-close on navigation via onNavigate callback.
